items.name: Ceramic Potion
items.description: Dust from Atlantis, ground unicorn horn, and cookie crumbs. This potion increases your max health, at a slight cost to speed.

items.name: Keith's Vengeance Launcher
items.description: Keith has been leaving these angry-looking jars of peanut butter around the office, so we made this gun in his honor. It lobs sticky peanut butter at people, which slows their walkspeed down to a crawl. Then you can move in and get the vengeance you deserve.

items.name: Staff of Celestial Light
items.description: Staff of wonder, staff of light, take my enemies dark as night, stop them with your celestial light.

items.name: Danceblaster 7000
items.description: Best way to disarm your foe?  Make him dance!  Anyone who gets hit with the dance ray won't be able to stop the uncontrollable dance fever!

items.name: DarkAge Shuriken
items.description: Click to throw two of these powerful weapons swirling towards your foes.  Anyone hit is dealt 22 damage per shuriken.

items.name: Throwing Lunchbox
items.description: Cheese sandwiches again? Anyone want to trade? Click to toss your lunchbox at foes and send your sandwiches flying.

items.name: Agent 99's Laser Goggles
items.description: Your mission can only be completed with the latest laser technology.  Aim lasers at people to do massive fiery damage.

items.name: Judge Underwood's Gavel
items.description: No you're out of order!  This whole trial's out of order!

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Deluxe Sword and Shield Set
items.description: Don't let this simple, elegant blade fool you.  This is the most deadly Redcliff sword yet!

items.name: Hand Cannon
items.description: The Hand Cannon was recently discovered in a deep sea dive to recover artifacts from Blackbeard’s sunken pirate ship. It is rumored only Blackbeard himself was able to wield this mighty weapon.

items.name: Fire Breathing Dragon Friend
items.description: He only breathes fire when he's really mad.  So you shouldn't worry...just don't make him mad.

items.name: Sabertooth Attack Friend
items.description: The thing about sabertooths is they always get their 'point' across. Equip to spawn a sabertooth tiger by your side! He'll chase after your foes and bite them with his massive fangs, dealing quite some damage.

items.name: Potion of the Fiery Fists
items.description: This magical elixir lets you run quickly to catch up with your opponent. Once you've got him - it's on!

items.name: S-79 Speed Stunter
items.description: This explosive creates a 10-second poisonous cloud with a 20-foot radius, slowing affected players' movements for up to ten seconds and doing 10 damage per second if you get caught in the cloud.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Lightning Staff
items.description: Cast orbs that shoot lightning at your enemies when they get too close! Enemies hit are dealt 20 damage each.

items.name: Bongos
items.description: Dance to the rhythm of the beat!

items.name: Zombification Injection
items.description: Steal other people's life force to transform yourself into a powerful and angry zombie.  As a zombie, use your powerful hammer to do 40 damage per hit to other players.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Ballista
items.description: While their capability to melee combat their opponents is only rivaled by the RedCliff Knights, the Knights of the Splintered Skies also make use of some heavy artillery. The ballista, a strong long range powerful artillery, is capable of shooting bolts at ridiculous speed and power, and destroying multiple targets at once. With its hidden ability to fire lit bolts that do constant light damage, the ballista is a powerful weapon indeed.

items.name: Granny's Crossbow
items.description: She uses it to hunt wolves.

items.name: Paper Ninja Stars
items.description: Ever had a paper cut? It's like that, but a lot worse. Click to throw in the direction of your cursor; three fly, twirling toward their target. The further they move away from you, the more they spread apart. Upon striking an opponent, they stick and deal 15 damage each.

items.name: Emerald Scatterblaster 2000
items.description: To make ammo for the Emerald Scatterblaster you heat emeralds until they're vapor.  Load the emerald vapor into the scatterblaster and you're good to go!

items.name: Neon Tiger Mount
items.description: Gaudy, fierce, and fast - the purrr-fect mount.

items.name: Four-In-A-Row
items.description: Play a quick game of Four-In-A-Row with a nearby player! (Get close to another player and click on them to start a game - they need to accept your challenge for the game to start)

items.name: Mind Controlled Lasers
items.description: Fire red lasers from your eyes...well, eye glasses.

items.name: Exploding Heart
items.description: Equip this exploding heart and click to throw it at your foes.  Anyone near the explosion will be thrown back and take 30-35 points of damage.

items.name: Spec Chi Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: After the Christmas wars of 3010 all promised never to forget. People knew they must remain vigilant to protect against the revolt of the Santa bots and the factory elves.  This sword was specially designed to protect against festive robots of all seasons.

items.name: Golden Chakram of the Sky Palace
items.description: This chakram was said to belong to a reclusive group of ninjas so enlightened that it was said they could communicate with inanimate objects. Legend has it they never carried more than one weapon, because they could call out to it from anywhere in the world, and it would always faithfully return.

items.name: Remote Control Plane
items.description: "I - Just want to fly!"

items.name: Zombie Grip Bomb
items.description: Your enemies will try to scream, but terror will take the sound before they make it.  Toss this zombie bomb up to 100 studs away and drag your enemies six feet under.

items.name: Pi RAIG Table
items.description: It's like (╯°□°)╯︵ ┻━┻ but with more π.  Also more damage. Also more actual pies. Okay virtual pies.
